mapper.select:
SELECT pl.total_spaces,
-- 현재 주차 대수 (IN - OUT) (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM parking_log WHERE entry_type = 'IN') - (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM parking_log WHERE entry_type = 'OUT') AS current_count,
-- 남은 자리 pl.total_spaces - ( (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM parking_log WHERE entry_type = 'IN') - (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM parking_log WHERE entry_type = 'OUT') ) AS available_count,
-- 현재 주차 중인 등록차량 -- IN 기록은 있고, 같은 차량번호의 OUT 기록이 없는 것만 (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM parking_log p_in WHERE p_in.entry_type = 'IN' AND p_in.vehicle_id IS NOT NULL AND NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM parking_log p_out WHERE p_out.entry_type = 'OUT' AND p_out.license_plate = p_in.license_plate AND p_out.logged_at > p_in.logged_at)) AS registered_count,
-- 현재 주차 중인 방문차량 (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM parking_log p_in WHERE p_in.entry_type = 'IN' AND p_in.visitor_vehicle_id IS NOT NULL AND NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM parking_log p_out WHERE p_out.entry_type = 'OUT' AND p_out.license_plate = p_in.license_plate AND p_out.logged_at > p_in.logged_at)) AS visitor_count,
-- 현재 주차 중인 미등록차량 (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM parking_log p_in WHERE p_in.entry_type = 'IN' AND p_in.vehicle_id IS NULL AND p_in.visitor_vehicle_id IS NULL AND p_in.fixed_visitor_vehicle_id IS NULL AND NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM parking_log p_out WHERE p_out.entry_type = 'OUT' AND p_out.license_plate = p_in.license_plate AND p_out.logged_at > p_in.logged_at)) AS unregistered_count
FROM parking_lot pl WHERE pl.lot_id = 1
